title: 2026 Academy Awards Predictions: Best Production Design - Award Expert
text: Award Expert's predictions for the 2026 Oscars Best Production Design category forecasts Frankenstein as the winner. The five nominees are: Frankenstein (Netflix, Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau), Sinners (Warner Bros, Hannah Beachler and Monique Champagne), Hamnet (Focus Features, Fiona Crombie and Alice Felton), Marty Supreme (A24, Jack Fisk and Adam Willis), and One Battle After Another (Warner Bros, Florencia Martin and Anthony Carlino). Award Expert provides expert analysis and predictions across all major Oscar categories, combining data from industry insiders, historical patterns, and current awards season momentum. The platform's predictions have demonstrated strong accuracy in forecasting Academy Award outcomes.
